Class-Druid — Female High Elf Druid: 20
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Entertainer Alignment: Lawful Good Deity: The Lawbearer (LN)
Experience: 683978/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Elf Ability Adjustment: +2 Dexterity
High Elf Ability Adjustment: +1 Intelligence
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Druid (Druid Circle)
Feats: Flash Recall; Great Weapon Master; Polearm Master; Savage Attacker; Spell Sniper High Elf Features: Cantrip (High Elf); Darkvision; Elf Ability Adjustment; Elf Weapon Training; Extra Language; Fey Ancestry; High Elf Ability Adjustment; Keen Senses; Language (Common; Elvish); Trance Druid Features: Archdruid; Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Shield); Beast Spells; Blighted Shape; Call Of The Shadowseeds; Circle Of The Blighted; Defile Ground; Druid Circle; Druidic; Foul Conjuration; Incarnation Of Corruption; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, Survival); Spellcasting (Druid); Timeless Body (Druid); Tool Proficiency (Herbalism Kit); Weapon Proficiency (Club; Dagger; Dart; Javelin; Mace; Quarterstaff; Scimitar; Sickle; Sling; Spear); Wild Shape Entertainer Features: By Popular Demand; Skill Proficiency (Acrobatics; Performance); Tool Proficiency (Disguise Kit; Choose 1 from any Musical Instrument)
Feature Notes:
Druid Circle: 1 selection
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Timeless Body (Druid): Ages at 1/10 normal rate
Trance: 4 hr meditation gives the benefits of 8 hr sleep
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +7 Insight: (wis) +1 Performance: (cha) +8
Animal Handling: (wis) +1 Intimidation: (cha) +8 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +8
Athletics: (str) +3 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +7 Survival: (wis) +7
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Intimidation; Perception; Performance; Religion; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Disguise Kit; Dulcimer; Herbalism Kit
Languages: Abyssal; Common; Elvish
Skill Notes:
Blighted Shape: Skill Proficiency (Intimidation)
Extra Language: Language (Choose 1 from any)
Keen Senses: Skill Proficiency (Perception)
By Popular Demand: Can receive welcome and lodging in exchange for performing
Druidic: Speaks a secret language known only by druids
Combat
Hit Points: 71 Initiative: +1 Armor Class: 13
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Club; Dagger; Dart; Javelin; Longbow; Longsword; Mace; Quarterstaff; Scimitar; Shortbow; Shortsword; Sickle; Sling; Spear
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Club (+9 1d4+3 B); Javelin (+9 1d6+3 P R30/120); Shortbow (+7 1d6+1 P R80/320); Unarmed Strike (+9 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Elf Weapon Training: Weapon Proficiency (Longbow; Longsword; Shortbow; Shortsword)
Incarnation Of Corruption: +2 Armor Class
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Defile Ground: R60' 20' radius creates difficult terrain for foes and inflicts +1d8 HP necrotic from the first hit on each creature each turn for 1 min once per short rest; can use a bonus action each turn to move it 30'
Great Weapon Master: Can use a bonus action to attack after scoring a critical hit or reducing a foe to 0 hit points with a melee weapon/Can make a -5 attack with a heavy weapon to inflict +10 damage
Incarnation Of Corruption: Can use a bonus action to gain 6 temporary hit points when within Defile Ground radius
Polearm Master: Can use a bonus action after attacking with a polearm to attack with the opposite end, inflicting 1d4 HP bludgeoning, and can make an opportunity attack against a foe who enters polearm reach
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 melee damage rolls once per turn
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +0; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +8; Strength: +3; Wisdom: +7
Save Notes:
Fey Ancestry: Has advantage vs. charm and immunity to magical sleep
Incarnation Of Corruption: Has resistance to necrotic
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: D0: 4; D: 21; W0: 1 Spell Slots: D1: 4; D2: 3; D3: 3; D4: 3; D5: 3; D6: 2; D7: 2; D8: 1; D9: 1 Attack: D: +7; W: +8 Spell DC: D: 15; W: 16
Spells:
Animal Friendship (D1 Ench): (Action) R30' Convinces target beast that self is harmless (save Wisdom negates; Intelligence 4 or higher immune) for 24 hr or until harmed (+Level affects +1 target)
Antilife Shell (D5 Abju): (Action) 10' radius prevents the passage of living creatures for concentration up to 1 hr
Beast Sense (D2 Divi): (Action) Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Conjure Fey (D6 Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons an obedient CR 6 fey for 1 hr; loss of concentration makes it hostile (+Level increases the CR by 1)
Control Water (D4 Tran): (Action) R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Darkvision (D2 Tran): (Action) Willing touched sees 60' in darkness for 8 hr
Detect Magic (D1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Feeblemind (D8 Ench): (Action) R150' Target suffers 4d6 HP psychic and reduction of Charisma and Intelligence to 1 (save Intelligence HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Fire Storm (D7 Evoc): (Action) R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Flame Blade (D2 Evoc): (Bonus) Self wields a flaming blade that inflicts 3d6 HP fire and emits a 10' bright light for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP per 2 levels)
Fog Cloud (D1 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Friends (W0 Ench): (Action) Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Geas (D5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 1 year or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Grasping Vine (D4 Conj): (Bonus) R30' 30' vine pulls a target 20' each rd (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Guidance (D0 Divi): (Action) Willing touched gains +1d4 on 1 ability check within concentration up to 1 min
Ice Storm (D4 Evoc): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d8 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP bludgeoning)
Mass Cure Wounds (D5 Evoc): (Action) R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 3d8+1 HP (+Level restores +1d8 HP)
Meld Into Stone (D3 Tran): (Action) Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP bludgeoning, expulsion, and prone on self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Mending (D0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Poison Spray (D0 Conj): (Action) R10' Inflicts 4d12 HP poison (save Constitution negates)
Protection From Energy (D3 Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Resistance (D0 Abju): (Action) Touched gains +1d4 on 1 save within concentration up to 1 min
Reverse Gravity (D7 Tran): (Action) R100' Items in a 50' radius, 100' high cylinder fall upward for concentration up to 1 min
Shapechange (D9 Tran): (Action) Allows self to polymorph repeatedly into familiar living creatures of equal or lesser CR, gaining the hit points and hit dice of that creature, for concentration up to 1 hr or until reduced to 0 hit points
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): (Bonus) Held club gains +7 magical attacks that inflict 1d8+1 HP for 1 min
Thunderwave (D1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Transport Via Plants (D6 Conj): (Action) R10' Allows creatures to use 5' of movement to teleport any distance from the targeted Large plant to a specified familiar Large plant for 1 rd
Wind Wall (D3 Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates a 50'x15'x1' area that inflicts 3d8 HP bludgeoning (save Strength half) and deflects lightweight creatures, objects, and projectiles for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Notes:
Archdruid: Has increased Wild Shape effects
Cantrip (High Elf): Knows 1 Wizard cantrip
Archdruid: Casting spells requires no verbal, somatic, or cost-free material components
Beast Spells: Can cast spells requiring no material components during Wild Shape
Blighted Shape: Wild Shape gives +2 Armor Class and +60' Darkvision
Call Of The Shadowseeds: Can use a reaction after a creature takes damage within the Defile Ground radius to summon a blighted sapling (Armor Class 16; 40 hit points; 2 +7 attacks each inflict 2d4+6 HP piercing) adjacent to it 6 times per long rest
Flash Recall: Can use a bonus action to replace a prepared spell once per short rest
Foul Conjuration: Summoned creatures gain immunity to necrotic, poison, and the poisoned condition and, when killed or on command, produce a R5' toxic shower that inflicts 1d4+ HP necrotic (save Constitution negates)
Spell Sniper: Ranged attack spells have double their normal range and ignore 3/4 cover/Knows an additional attack cantrip
Spellcasting (Druid): Can cast spells from the druid spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Wild Shape: Can transform into a CR 1 creature for 10 hr unlimited times per short rest
